steps.title: Identify the contributions to the total
steps.content:
The assignment is worth 70 points total. The points come from:
  • $x$ questions worth 1 point each, totaling $x$ points
  • $y$ questions worth 3 points each, totaling $3y$ points

steps.title: Set up the equation for the total
steps.content:
Since the total must be 70 points:
$$x + 3y = 70$$
That matches Choice D — $x+3y=70$.
